title: Login page error
description: Users are unable to login with correct credentials.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes in profile info are not being stored.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions fail due to timeout errors.

title: Dashboard stats incorrect
description: The dashboard shows wrong number of orders.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: Customers do not receive order confirmation emails.

title: Search feature slow
description: Searching for products takes more than 10 seconds.

title: Password reset link broken
description: Reset password emails contain invalid link.

title: Mobile layout issues
description: The website layout breaks on smaller screens.

title: Incorrect invoice amount
description: Invoices show wrong total for some orders.

title: Slow image upload
description: Uploading product images takes too long.
